title: Soulless Crystals
description: Takes the Purple Energy of the End Crystals
body:
## The Void Shard: Soulless End Crystals

The final piece of the ritual has been manifest. This pack transforms the standard glowing End Crystal into a **Soulless Crystal**—a heavy, monochromatic anchor that binds the physical world to the void.

---

### The Lore: The Shattered Anchor

To ensure his dominion over the End, **n32x3d_2** needed to sever the connection between the Ender Dragon and the light of the overworld. He placed a standard crystal within the blast radius of a **Wither’s star**, forcing the two opposing forces of life and decay to collide.

The result was a total collapse of color. The vibrant pink core was extinguished, replaced by a dense, swirling center of pure shadow. These crystals no longer emit a warm glow; they radiate a cold, pulsing frequency that draws the light out of the air. When used, they don't just heal—they rebuild the user’s form out of the very darkness they represent.

---

### Pack Features

* **Monochromatic Core:** The internal rotating cube is now a deep charcoal grey, losing its translucent pink hue for a more solid, "heavy" appearance.
* **Obsidian Framework:** The outer protective glass is etched with dark-matter patterns.
* **Stealth Resonance:** The particle effects emitted by the crystal are now black and grey, creating a "smoke" effect rather than the traditional bright sparkles.
* **The Final Relic:** This completes the "Soulless" collection, turning the ultimate power source of the End into a monument to the void.

---

### The "Soulless Void" Collection Complete

* **🛡️ [Black Shield](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/black-shield)**
* **🏹 [Shadow Bow and Arrow](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/shadow-arrow)** (Black Bow and Arrow)
* **🔭 [Black Spyglass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/black-spyglass)** (Black Spyglass)
* **🗿 [Soulless Totem](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/soulless-totem)** (Black Totem)
* **💎 Soulless Crystal** (Black End Crystal)
* **💔 [Better Crit Particals](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-crit-particles)** (-❤️ Effect)
